titleStmt.title: Pune plates of Dhruvasena II, [Valabhńę] year 320, VaiŇõńĀkha Ňõu 6

licence.p: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

msContents.summary: Grant of a village in favour of two Yajurvedins.

projectDesc.p: This project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_IdListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.p:
* svasti valabhńętaŠł• prasabhapraŠĻáatńĀmitrńĀŠĻáńĀŠĻĀ maitrakńĀŠĻáńĀm atulabalasaŠĻĀpannamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhogasaŠĻĀsaktaprahńĀraŇõatalabdhapra
tńĀpńĀt pratńĀpopanatadńĀnamńĀnńĀrjjavopńĀrjjitńĀnurńĀgńĀd anuraktamaulabhŠĻõtaŇõreŠĻáńębalńĀvńĀptarńĀjyaŇõriyaŠł• paramamńĀhe
ŇõvaraŇõrńębhaŠĻ≠ńĀrkkńĀd avyavacchinnarńĀjavaŠĻÖŇõńĀn mńĀtańĀpitŠĻõcaraŠĻáńĀravindapraŠĻáatipravidhautńĀŇõeŠĻ£akalmaŠĻ£aŇõ ŇõaiŇõavńĀt prabhŠĻõti khaŠłćgadvitńęya
bńĀhur aeva samadaparagajaghaŠĻ≠ńĀsphoŠĻ≠anaprakńĀŇõitasatvanikaŠĻ£as tatprabhńĀvapraŠĻáatńĀrńĀticŇęŠłćńĀratnaprabhńĀsaŠĻĀsaktapńĀdanakha
raŇõmisaŠĻÖhatis sakalasmŠĻõtipraŠĻáńętamńĀrggasamyakparipańĀlanaprajńĀhŠĻõdayara√ĪjanńĀnvarttharńĀjaŇõabdo rŇępakńĀntisthairyyagańĀmbhńęryyabu
ddhisampadbhiŠł• smaraŇõaŇõńĀŠĻÖkńĀdrirńĀjodadhitridaŇõagurudhaneŇõńĀn atiŇõayńĀnaŇõ ŇõaraŠĻáńĀgatńĀbhayapradńĀnaparatayńĀ tŠĻõŠĻáavadapńĀstańĀŇõeŠĻ£asva
kńĀryyaphalaŠł• prńĀrtthanńĀdhikańĀrtthapradńĀnńĀnanditavidvatsuhŠĻõtpraŠĻáayihŠĻõdayaŠł• pńĀdacńĀrńęva sakalabhuvanamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhogapramodaŠł• paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł•
Ňõrńęguhasenas tasya sutas tatpńĀdanakhamayŇękhasantńĀnavisŠĻõtajńĀhnavńęjalaughaprakŠĻ£ńĀlitńĀŇõeŠĻ£akalmaŠĻ£aŠł• praŠĻáayiŇõatasahasropajńęvyamńĀnasa
mpad rŇępalobhńĀd ivńĀŇõritas sarabhasam ńĀbhigńĀmikair gguŠĻáais sahajaŇõaktiŇõikŠĻ£ńĀviŇõeŠĻ£avismńĀpitńĀkhiladhanurddharaŠł• prathamanarapatisama
tisŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠ńĀnńĀm anupńĀlayitńĀ dharmmadańĀyńĀnńĀm apńĀkarttńĀ prajopaghńĀtakńĀriŠĻáńĀm upaplavńĀnńĀŠĻĀ darŇõayitńĀ Ňõrńęsarasvatyor ńĀekńĀdhivńĀsasya saŠĻÖha
tńĀrańĀtipakŠĻ£alakŠĻ£mńęparibhogadakŠĻ£avikramo vikramopasaŠĻĀprńĀptavimalapńĀrtthivaŠł•ŇõrńęŠł• paramamańĀheŇõvaraŠł• Ňõrńędharasenas tasya sutas tatpńĀdńĀ
nuddhyńĀtas sakalajagadńĀnandanańĀtyadbhutaguŠĻáasamaudayasthagaitasamagradiŠĻÖmaŠĻáŠłćalas samaraŇõatavijayaŇõobhńĀsanńĀthamaŠĻáŠłćalńĀ
gradyutibhńĀsuratarńĀnsapńęŠĻ≠hodŇęŠłćhagurumanorathamahńĀbhńĀras sarvvavidyńĀparńĀparavibhńĀgńĀdhigamavimalamatir api sarvvatas su
bhńĀŠĻ£italavenańĀpi sukhopapńĀdanńęyaparitoŠĻ£as samagralokńĀgńĀdhagńĀmbhńęryyahŠĻõdayo pi sucaritńĀtiŇõayasuvyaktaparama
kalyńĀŠĻáasvabhńĀvaŠł• khilńębhŇętakŠĻõtayuganaŠĻõpatipathaviŇõodhanańĀdhigatodagrarkńęrttir ddharmmńĀnuparodhojjvalatarńękŠĻõtńĀrtthasukhasampa
dupasevńĀnirŇęŠłćhadharmmńĀdityadvitńęyanńĀmńĀ paramamańĀheŇõvaraŠł• ŇõrńęŇõińęlńĀdityas tasyańĀnujas tatpńĀdńĀnuddhyńĀtaŠł• svayam upendraguru
ŠĻáeva guruŠĻáńĀtyńĀdaravatńĀ samabhilaŠĻ£aŠĻáńęyńĀm api rńĀjalakŠĻ£mńęŠĻĀ skandhńĀsaktńĀŠĻĀ paramabhadra Iva dhuryyas tadńĀj√ĪńĀsampńĀdanaikarasa
tayaivodvahan khedasukharatibhyńĀm anńĀyńĀsaitasatvasampattiŠł• prabhńĀvasampadvaŇõńękŠĻõtanŠĻõpatiŇõataŇõiroratnacchńĀyopagŇęŠłćhapńĀ
dapńęŠĻ≠ho pai parńĀvaj√ĪńĀbhimńĀnarasńĀnńĀliŠĻÖgitamanovŠĻõttiŠł• praŠĻáatim ekńĀŠĻĀ parityajya prakhyńĀtapauruŠĻ£ńĀbhimńĀnair apy arńĀtibhir anupa
sńĀditapratikriyopńĀyaŠł• kŠĻõtanikhilabhuvanańĀmodavimalaguŠĻáasaŠĻÖhatiŠł• prasabhavighaŠĻ≠itasakalakalivilasitaga
tir nnńęcajanadńĀdhirohibhir aŇõeŠĻ£aair ddoŠĻ£air anńĀmŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠ańĀtyunnatahŠĻõdayaŠł• prakhyńĀtapauruŠĻ£ńĀstrakauŇõalńĀtiŇõayagaŠĻáatithavi
pakŠĻ£akŠĻ£itipatilakŠĻ£mńęsvayaŠĻĀgrahaprakauńĀŇõitapravńęrapuruŠĻ£aprathamasaŠĻĀkhyńĀdhigamaŠł• paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł•
Ňõrńękharagrahas tasya tanayas tatpńĀdńĀnuddhyńĀtaŠł• sakalavidyńĀdhigamavaihitanikhilavidvajjanamanaŠł•pari
toŠĻ£ńĀtiŇõayaŠł• satvasampadńĀ tyńĀgaudńĀryyeŠĻáa ca vigatńĀnusandhńĀnńĀŇõamńĀhitńĀrńĀtipakŠĻ£amanaorathańĀkŠĻ£abhaŠĻÖgaŠł• samya
gupalakŠĻ£itńĀnekaŇõńĀstrakalńĀlokacaritagahvaravibhńĀgo pi paramabhadraprakŠĻõtir akaŠĻõtrimapraŇõrayavinayaŇõobhńĀvi
bhŇęŠĻ£aŠĻáas samaraŇõatajayapatńĀkńĀharaŠĻáapratyalodagrabńĀhudaŠĻáŠłćavidhvansitanaikhilapratipakŠĻ£adarppodayaŠł• svadhanuŠłęprabhńĀva
paribhŇętńĀstrakauŇõalńĀbhimańĀnaŠł• sakalanŠĻõpatimaŠĻáŠłćalńĀbhinanditaŇõńĀsanaŠł• paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• Ňõrńędharasenas tasyńĀnujas tatpńĀdńĀnu
ddhyańĀtas saccaraitńĀtiŇõayitasakalapŇęrvvanarapatir atidussńĀdhńĀnńĀm api prasńĀdhayitńĀ viŠĻ£ayńĀŠĻáńĀŠĻĀ mŇęrttimńĀn iva puruŠĻ£akńĀraŠł• bparivŠĻõddhagu
ŠĻáńĀnurńĀganirbbharacittavŠĻõttibhir mmanur iva svayam abhyupapannaŠł• prakŠĻõtibhir adhigatakalńĀkalńĀpaŠļĖ kńĀntimńĀn nirvŠĻõtihetur akalaŠĻÖkaŠļĖ kumuda
nńĀthaŠł• prńĀjyapratńĀpasthagitadigantarńĀlapradhvansitadhvńĀntarńĀŇõis satatoditas savitńĀ prakŠĻõtibhyaŠłę paraŠĻĀ pratyayam artthavantam ati
bahutithaprayojanńĀnubadndham ńĀgamaparipŇęrŠĻáŠĻáaŠĻĀ vidadhńĀnaŠł• sandhivigrahasamńĀsanicŇõcayanipuŠĻáaŠł• sthńĀne nurŇępam ńĀdeŇõaŠĻĀ dadad guŠĻáavŠĻõddhivi
dhńĀnajanitasaŠĻĀskńĀras sarańĀdhŇęnńĀŠĻĀ rńĀjyasńĀlńĀturńęyatantrayor ubhayor api niŠĻ£ŠĻáńĀtaŠł• prakŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠avikramo pi karuŠĻáńĀmŠĻõduhŠĻõdayaŠł•
ŇõrutavńĀn apy agarvvitaŠļĖ kńĀnto pi praŇõamińę sthirasauhŠĻõdayyo pai nirasitńĀ doŠĻ£avatńĀm udayasamayasamupajanitajanatńĀnurńĀga
paripihitabhuvanasamartthitaprathitabńĀlńĀdityadvitńęyanńĀmńĀ paramamńĀheŇõvaraŠł• ŇõrńędhruvasenaŠļĖ kuŇõalńę sarvvńĀn eva yathńĀ
sambaddhyamńĀnakńĀn samańĀj√ĪńĀpayaty astu vas saŠĻĀviditaŠĻĀ yathńĀ mayńĀ mńĀtńĀpitroŠłę puŠĻáyńĀpyńĀyanńĀya daŇõapuravinirggatakhetakanivńĀsibhńĀra
dvńĀjasagotravńęryyasabrahmacńĀribrńĀhmaŠĻáabhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠iputrabrńĀhmaŠĻáanńĀgaŇõarmmabhadraŇõarmmabhyńĀŠĻĀ kheŠĻ≠akńĀhńĀraviŠĻ£aye rńĀdhńĀnakapathakńĀntarggata
devapńĀŠłćhakagrńĀmaŠł• sodraŠĻÖgaŠł• soparikaraŠł• sabhŇętavńĀtapratyńĀyaŠł• sathdhńĀnyahiraŠĻáyńĀdeyaŠł• sadaŇõńĀpńĀarńĀdhaŠł• sotpadyamńĀnavi
ŠĻ£ŠĻ≠ikaŠł• sarvvarńĀjakńęyńĀnńĀm ahastaprakŠĻ£epaŠĻáńęyaŠł• pŇęrvvaprattadevabrahmadeyabrńĀhmaŠĻáaviŠĻÖŇõartirahitaŠł• bhŇęmicchidranyńĀyenńĀca
ndrńĀrkkńĀrŠĻáŠĻáavakŠĻ£itisaritparvvatasamakńĀlńęnaŠł• putrapautrńĀnvayaopabhogya UdakńĀtisarggeŠĻáa dharmmadńĀyo nisŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠aŠł• yato syocita
bhŇętayńĀ brahmadeyasthityńĀ bhunjatsutoŠł• kŠĻõŠĻ£atsutoŠł• karŠĻ£ayatsutoŠł• pradiŇõatsutoŠł• vńĀ na kaiŇõcid vyńĀsedhe varttitavyam ńĀgńĀmamaibhadranŠĻõpatibhir asma
dvaŠĻÖŇõajair anyair vvńĀ AnityńĀny aiŇõvaryyńĀŠĻáy asthiraŠĻĀ mańĀnuŠĻ£yaŠĻĀ samańĀnyaŠĻĀ ca bhŇęmidńĀnaphalaŠĻĀ avagacchadbhir ayam asmaddńĀyo numantavyaŠł•
paripńĀlayitavyaŇõ cetyukta√Ī ca

lg.l: yasya yasya yadńĀ bhŇęmis tasya tasya tadńĀ phalaŠĻĀ
nirbbhuktamńĀlyapratimńĀni tńĀni ko nńĀma sańĀdhuŠł• punar ńĀdadńęta

ŠĻ£aŠĻ£ŠĻ≠iŠĻĀ varŠĻ£a
sahasrńĀŠĻái svarge tiŠĻ£ŠĻ≠hati bhŇęmidaŠł•
ńÄchettńĀ cńĀnumantńĀ ca tńĀny eva narake vaseT

div.p:
dŇętako tra rńĀjaputraŇõrńękharagrahaŠł•
likhitam idaŠĻĀ sandhivigrahńĀdhikŠĻõtadivirapativatrabhattiputradivńęirapatiskandabhaŠĻ≠ena saŠĻĀ 300 20 vaiŇõńĀkha Ňõu 6
svahasto mama ..
